entries.note: Canberra was chosen as a compromise between Sydney and Melbourne.
Golden wattle is Australia's national floral emblem.

entries.clue: Sacred sandstone monolith in central Australia
entries.note: Uluru is sacred to the Anangu people.
Dingoes occupy a complicated ecological and cultural place in Australia.
The bilby has become a native alternative to the Easter bunny.
The Great Barrier Reef is the world's largest coral reef system.

entries.clue: Large flightless bird on Australia's coat of arms
entries.note: The emu appears with the kangaroo on Australia's coat of arms.

entries.clue: Gem famously mined at Coober Pedy
entries.note: Australia produces much of the world's opal.

entries.clue: Small marsupial known for a seeming smile
entries.note: Quokkas are strongly associated with Rottnest Island.
The Nullarbor Plain's name derives from Latin roots meaning no trees.
